significantUpdates.detail: Tencent TextToModel & ImageToModel nodes merged into ComfyUI core (PR #12680). Tencent 3D generation now built-in, no 3rd party node needed.
Modular assets architecture + async two-phase scanner (PR #12621). FluxKVCache node added. CacheProvider API added then reverted.
LTX VAE chunked encoder + CPU IO chunking, WAN VAE VRAM reduction, --fp16-intermediates flag

nodeEcosystem.ComfyUI-Hunyuan3D: SageAttention disabled for v2.1 in v0.18.0

notificationNote: Feishu push failed - webchat session cannot send to feishu. Main agent should push.
